channel.title: ChinaTripBox Travel Guides
channel.description: Practical China travel guides for foreign visitors: payments, eSIMs, transport, apps, cities, food, and first-trip planning.

item.title: Guangzhou City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Guangzhou for foreign tourists — Canton Tower, Shamian Island, Chen Clan Academy, Cantonese food guide, metro tips, and practical advice for visiting southern China's capital of commerce and cuisine.

item.title: Nanjing City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Nanjing for foreign tourists — top attractions like Ming Xiaoling and Niushoushan, Qinhuai River nightlife, local food, metro tips, and practical advice for a smooth visit.

item.title: Xi'an City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Xi'an for foreign tourists — Terracotta Warriors, City Wall, Muslim Quarter, food guide, metro tips, and practical advice for visiting China's ancient capital.

item.title: What to Do If You Lose Your Passport in China: Emergency Guide for Tourists
item.description: Step-by-step emergency guide for foreign tourists who lose their passport in China — police report, embassy process, temporary travel documents, costs, timelines, and what to do while you wait.

item.title: Travel Insurance for China 2026: What Foreign Visitors Actually Need
item.description: Honest 2026 guide to travel insurance for China — what coverage foreigners actually need, how much it costs, which providers work, and the real scenarios where insurance saves you thousands.

item.title: How to Buy a Chinese SIM Card as a Foreigner 2026: China Mobile, Unicom, Telecom Compared
item.description: Step-by-step guide to buying a local Chinese SIM card as a foreign tourist in 2026 to compare China Mobile, China Unicom, and China Telecom on price, coverage, English support, and airport pickup options.

item.title: China Food Guide for Foreigners 2026: Regional Dishes, How to Order & Eat Safely
item.description: A practical guide to Chinese regional cuisine for foreign visitors — what to eat by region, how to order without speaking Chinese, restaurant tips, food safety, and essential dining phrases.

item.title: How to Visit a TCM Doctor or Clinic in China 2026: Practical Guide for Foreign Visitors
item.description: Step-by-step guide to seeing a Traditional Chinese Medicine doctor in China as a foreigner: choosing a clinic, booking appointments, costs, translation tools, and what to expect during your visit.

item.title: Alipay vs WeChat Pay for Foreigners 2026: Which Payment App Should You Use?
item.description: Compare Alipay and WeChat Pay for your China trip in 2026 — setup difficulty, card support, fees, and which one works best for tourists, with step-by-step setup instructions.

item.title: First 24 Hours in China 2026: Complete Arrival Checklist for Foreign Visitors
item.description: What to do in your first 24 hours in China as a foreign tourist — airport arrival checklist, getting internet, setting up Alipay, using Didi, and navigating to your hotel without stress.

item.title: Do You Need a VPN in China 2026? Tourist Internet Guide
item.description: Do tourists still need a VPN in China in 2026? Practical guide to internet access, blocked apps, working VPNs, and eSIM options that bypass censorship for foreign visitors.

item.title: China Trip Planner 2026: Payment, eSIM, Transport and Apps for First-Time Visitors
item.description: Complete China trip planner for first-time visitors in 2026 — what to set up before departure: payments, eSIM, transport apps, packing checklist, and a 24-hour arrival plan.

item.title: What to Set Up Before Traveling to China 2026: Apps, Payments and Documents
item.description: Essential pre-departure checklist for China 2026 — install Alipay and WeChat Pay, buy an eSIM, set up Didi and 12306, download translation apps, and prepare your documents before you fly.

item.title: Why China Does Not Have a Tipping Culture: A Foreigner's Guide to Service Etiquette
item.description: Understand why tipping is not customary in China — cultural differences, when service charges apply, how to show appreciation without tipping, and practical etiquette for foreign visitors.

item.title: Beijing City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Beijing for first-time foreign visitors — top attractions, getting around, food, accommodation areas, Great Wall day trips, and practical travel tips.

item.title: Can You Still Use Cash in China in 2026? A Foreign Visitor's Guide
item.description: China is mostly cashless, but cash still works. This 2026 guide explains when you need cash, where to exchange currency, and how much RMB to carry as a backup payment method.

item.title: Chengdu City Guide for Foreigners 2026: Pandas, Food and Travel Tips
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Chengdu for foreign visitors — panda bases, Sichuan food, teahouses, transport tips, day trips, and practical advice for enjoying this food capital of China.

item.title: Chengdu Street Food 2026: Safety, Spice Levels and What to Order
item.description: Your practical 2026 guide to Chengdu street food — how to handle Sichuan spice levels, food safety tips, must-try dishes, and how to order without speaking Chinese.

item.title: Hangzhou City Guide for Foreigners 2026: West Lake and Beyond
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Hangzhou for foreign tourists — West Lake attractions, tea culture, day trips from Shanghai, transport tips, and practical advice for a weekend visit.

item.title: Link a Foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay in China 2026: Step-by-Step
item.description: Step-by-step 2026 guide to linking your foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay — app setup, identity verification, card binding, and troubleshooting common errors.

item.title: Sanya City Guide for Foreigners 2026: Beaches, Resorts and Travel Tips
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Sanya for foreign visitors — best beaches, resort areas, water activities, Hainan Island tips, winter sun escape planning, and practical transport advice.

item.title: Shanghai City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to Shanghai for foreign tourists — best areas to stay, top attractions, metro tips, food recommendations, day trips, and practical advice for a smooth visit.

item.title: How to Use the Shanghai Metro as a Foreigner: QR Codes, Tickets & Tips (2026)
item.description: How to use the Shanghai metro as a foreign tourist in 2026 — Alipay QR code entry, ticket machines, line transfers, airport connections, and troubleshooting for non-Chinese speakers.

item.title: Tipping in China 2026: When It's Expected and When It's Not (Tourist Guide)
item.description: Should you tip in China in 2026? Practical guide for foreign visitors — which services expect tips, which do not, how much to tip at hotels and restaurants, and cultural etiquette to avoid awkward moments.

item.title: What to Pack for China 2026: Season-by-Season Checklist for Foreign Tourists
item.description: Ultimate packing checklist for China travel in 2026 — what to pack by season (spring, summer, autumn, winter), essential apps and documents, luggage tips, and items you should not forget.

item.title: Beijing Daxing Airport to City Center 2026: First-Timer's Transport Guide
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to getting from Beijing Daxing International Airport to the city center — airport express train, taxi costs, Didi, metro options, and tips for first-time visitors.

item.title: Airport to City in China 2026: Beijing, Shanghai & Guangzhou Transport Guide
item.description: How to get from the airport to city center in Beijing (PEK/PKX), Shanghai (PVG/SHA), and Guangzhou (CAN) in 2026 — metro costs, express train times, taxi fares, DiDi alternatives, and step-by-step instructions for first-time visitors.

item.title: Does Apple Pay Work in China? The Honest Truth for Travelers (2026)
item.description: Does Apple Pay or Google Pay work in China in 2026? Here's the real answer for tourists — where contactless taps work, when they fail, and which payment method to actually use at each merchant type.
item.category: does apple pay work in china

item.title: China High-Speed Rail Guide for Foreigners 2026: Booking, Classes and Tips
item.description: Essential 2026 guide to China's high-speed rail for foreign travelers — ticket classes, how to book with a passport, station navigation, onboard amenities, and money-saving tips.

item.title: China Visa-Free Entry and Transit 2026: Do You Need a Visa?
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to China visa-free entry, 240-hour transit, and visa policies by nationality — eligibility checker, airport processes, required documents, and common questions for foreign travelers.

item.title: China eSIM vs Roaming 2026: The Real 10-Day Cost Comparison for Tourists
item.description: Should you buy a China eSIM or use your home carrier roaming in 2026? A practical cost and performance comparison for a 10-day trip, with recommendations by traveler type.

item.title: How Much Cash to Bring to China in 2026: Tourist Money Guide
item.description: Practical cash advice for China travelers in 2026 — how much RMB to carry, where to exchange foreign currency, ATM fees, and how to balance cash with mobile payments.

item.title: Internet Access in China 2026: Which Apps Work for Tourists Without a VPN
item.description: A practical 2026 guide to which apps work in China without a VPN, which are blocked, and how to stay connected with messaging, maps, and social media as a foreign tourist.

item.title: Ordering Food in China Without Chinese 2026: Meituan, Ele.me and Restaurant Tips
item.description: How to order food delivery in China without speaking Chinese in 2026 — using Meituan and Ele.me, H5 web alternatives, Alipay mini-programs, and restaurant ordering tips for foreigners.

item.title: Pocket WiFi vs eSIM vs Local SIM in China 2026: Best Option for Tourists
item.description: Compare Pocket WiFi, eSIM, and local SIM cards for China travel in 2026 — coverage, speed, ease of setup, and cost — to find the best internet option for your trip.

item.title: Can You Use a Foreign Credit Card in China 2026? Where It Works
item.description: Find out where foreign Visa and Mastercard credit cards are accepted in China in 2026 — hotels, ATMs, international chains — and when you still need Alipay or WeChat Pay.

item.title: Alipay for Foreigners 2026: How to Link a Foreign Credit Card Step by Step
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to setting up Alipay as a foreign visitor: download the app, verify your passport, and link a Visa or Mastercard for payments anywhere in China.

item.title: How to Pay for Things in China 2026: 3 Methods Ranked for Tourists (Alipay, Card, Cash)
item.description: How to pay for things in China as a tourist in 2026 — Alipay, WeChat Pay, foreign credit cards, cash backup, and which method works at each type of merchant. Includes a quick decision flowchart.

item.title: WeChat Pay for Foreign Visitors 2026: Complete Setup and Usage Guide
item.description: How to set up WeChat Pay as a foreign tourist in 2026 — download, registration, linking a foreign card, and using it for payments, transfers, and mini-programs in China.

item.title: Which eSIM Works in China Without a VPN? 2026 Comparison Guide (Airalo, Holafly, Nomad)
item.description: Compare the best eSIM providers for China in 2026 — Airalo, Holafly, Nomad — with pricing, data limits, and which ones bypass the Great Firewall so Google, WhatsApp, and Instagram work without a separate VPN.

item.title: How to Book China Train Tickets on 12306 as a Foreigner 2026
item.description: Step-by-step guide to booking China train tickets on 12306 with a foreign passport in 2026 — registration, verification, payment options, and alternative booking platforms.

item.title: Didi for Foreign Tourists 2026: How to Use China's Ride-Hailing App
item.description: Step-by-step 2026 guide to using DiDi in China as a foreign tourist — English interface setup, adding payment methods, booking rides, and tips for airport and city travel.
